_help: Edit this file, then re-run scripts/build_site.py. checkout_url = your Lemon Squeezy buy link (leave empty until you have one; Pro buttons then point at the pricing page). pro_price_label = e.g. '£12/month'. site_url = your live Cloudflare Pages URL. No secrets go here — R2 and Lemon Squeezy keys live in Cloudflare env vars (see LAUNCH.md).
